objective: Use a short initial risk burst, then revert permanently to risk 25 for unresolved challenges.
selection_gate: A candidate must improve both threshold and adverse development pass_pct by at least 1.0 percentage point versus the incumbent. Select the largest minimum improvement; ties prefer lower peak risk and shorter burst.
holdout_rule: Open 2024-2025 once only for a selected joint survivor.
sequential_research_warning: This family was declared after the separate deadline-acceleration holdout and therefore requires the stronger one-point development hurdle.
